file_insights.purpose: Header bar widget rendering status line and event ticker
notable_impl: Sparkline generation: maps throughput to Unicode block chars (▁-█)
Provider meter coloring: green/yellow/red based on status
Event ticker: demoscene-style marquee with cyclic offset wrapping
Conditional rendering: ticker only for width >= 120

changes: Added 4 new fields: provider_meters, recent_completions, tick_count, prev_done_count
Implemented on_tick() for animation counter advancement
Implemented refresh_provider_meters() reading providers.json with cooldown check
Implemented track_completions() for delta-based completion detection
file_insights.state_management: VecDeque for throughput history (8 samples), Vec for meters, VecDeque for ticker entries

changes: Replaced placeholder header with render_header call
Updated test mock to include all 4 new App fields with default values

patterns_discovered.benefit: Type-safe status representation with deterministic styling
Compact visual throughput representation without line drawing

patterns_discovered.pattern: Cyclic ticker scrolling via modulo offset
patterns_discovered.context: tick_offset % total_len with char cycle iterator
patterns_discovered.benefit: Smooth infinite marquee without reallocating string
No polling; detects new completions on column refresh

patterns_discovered.pattern: Conditional rendering based on terminal width
patterns_discovered.benefit: Responsive design; prevents clutter on narrow terminals

gotchas_discovered.solution: All samples map to SPARK_CHARS[0] (▁) when max_val == 0
gotchas_discovered.context: Edge case when throughput is all zeros

gotchas_discovered.issue: Provider meter refresh on every tick
gotchas_discovered.observation: reads providers.json + compares against running cards each frame
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Consider debouncing or caching provider reads to reduce I/O

gotchas_discovered.context: TICKER_CAPACITY constant may need adjustment for different use cases

gotchas_discovered.observation: Full diff unavailable; test implementations and some documentation cut off
gotchas_discovered.impact: Unable to verify complete test coverage

gotchas_discovered.issue: Completion detection relies on 'done' column existence
gotchas_discovered.context: Will silently skip if done_col not found; no error logging

discoveries.approach_summary: Implementation completed all requirements: HeaderWidget renders with time/meters/sparkline/throughput, provider status colors (green/amber/red), event ticker with demoscene-style scrolling (width >= 120), and integrated tick event handling into App state machine.

recommendations.suggestion: Debounce or cache providers.json reads instead of every-tick refresh; consider 100-200ms refresh interval or event-driven updates
Expand unit tests for edge cases: zero throughput sparkline, empty completions list, truncated ticker at various widths
Make TICKER_CAPACITY and TICKER_SEP configurable via App or config file for flexibility
Add logging/metric when completion tracking fails to find done column; emit warnings for malformed providers.json
Consider coloring event ticker entries by completion status (success/failure) or provider name for richer feedback
